title: Lindernia bolusii
taxonomy: Lindernia bolusii is classified within the family Linderniaceae, which is a group of aquatic plants commonly known as false pimpernels. This plant belongs to the order Lamiales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants that also includes mint, lavender, and snapdragons. Within the family Linderniaceae, Lindernia bolusii is placed in the genus Lindernia, which comprises about 200 species of aquatic plants. The classification of Lindernia bolusii is further supported by molecular phylogenetic studies, which have confirmed its placement within the Linderniaceae family. Lindernia bolusii is also classified within the kingdom Plantae, which comprises all plant species.
